history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with curly dark hair, seen from behind, stands in front of an open glass-doored refrigerator in what appears to be a convenience store or minimarket. They are wearing a black hoodie with a graphic design on the back featuring the word "Drake" in white lettering with red accents and an image of a rooster and roses. The hoodie is paired with black shorts and white socks with black slides. The refrigerator is stocked with numerous bottles of water, some clear and some with red caps. To the left of the main refrigerator, another cooler is visible, containing snacks and drinks. The background features a wall with horizontal wooden slats and two large, circular red signs with white graphics of a cup with a straw. The lighting is bright and even, typical of an indoor retail environment, creating a slightly washed-out, high-contrast effect. The overall mood is casual and everyday, capturing a moment of selection in a retail setting. The color palette is dominated by the cool blues of the water bottles, the warm tones of the wooden wall, and the stark contrast of the red signs and black clothing.
